creator: shrdlu19@gmail.com
text:
I got the problem when building ports databases/galera26 with Poudriere for FreeBSD 12.1
This port required for databases/MariaDB104-server port

c++ -o galera/tests/certification_check.o -c -Weffc++ -std=c++11 -pipe -Wno-long-long -Wno-deprecated -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -g -O3 -DNDEBUG -m64 -pthread -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -DHAVE_COMMON_H -DHAVE_SYS_ENDIAN_H -DHAVE_EXECINFO_H -DHAVE_STD_ARRAY -DHAVE_BOOST_SHARED_PTR_HPP -DHAVE_STD_UNORDERED_MAP -DBOOST_DATE_TIME_POSIX_TIME_STD_CONFIG=1 -DHAVE_ASIO_HPP -DOPENSSL_HAS_SET_ECDH_AUTO -Iasio -I/usr/local/include -Iwsrep/src -I. -Icommon -Igalerautils/src -Igcache/src -Igcs/src -Igalera/src galera/tests/certification_check.cpp
